title: Galospheric Delight
description: This mod adds compatibility between Galosphere and Farmer’s Delight.
body:
![galologo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa9a1bba010abd969a4be0667ee807b626c5884.png)

[![yt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/976428cc3628909cd4b82eeadfa96012a4acc87a.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@Cosmoocat) 
[![ds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb29e96bf480ff4df0c955440ca77e289b5b3613.png)](https://discord.gg/34Wy4VmD9m) 
[![cf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/504f6864a47697c1778d6ba25b87c5cb10c820cc.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/galospheric-delight)

This mod adds compatibility between Galosphere and Farmer’s Delight.

We know about NoCube's Galosphere Delight, but it hasn't been updated for a long time and has bugs. So we decided to make our own addon. All the textures were drawn by us, and we tried to add original ideas.

<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

- Silver Hammer
- Lumiere Dust
- Lumiere Pie
- Lumiere Pie Slice
- Lumiere Cupcake
- Allurite Dust
- Allurite Pie
- Allurite Pie Slice
- Allurite Cupcake
- Amethyst Dust
- Amethyst Pie
- Amethyst Pie Slice
- Amethyst Cupcake
- Specterpillar
- Specterpillar Sauce
- Pink Salt Dust
- Salted Fish
- Azalea Petals
- lichen Cordyceps Rolls
- Lush Sandwich
- Membranburger
- Salted Caramel
- Salted Caramel Cake
- Salted Caramel Apple
- Apples in chicken broth
- Fruits in amethyst dust
- chicken cuts with sparkling rice
- Cave pizza
- Cave barbecue stick

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fda6bfeb79fec93c473f4a1b51a75ee269afff5.png)

</details>

- Pink Salt Dast Bag
- Salted Caramel Bricks
- Chiseled Salted Caramel Bricks

![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb0aef40506f79ba1badcf576926acfec9dbf018.png)
